summary: Taiki has flipped to a bullish outlook in his most recent video, explicitly calling a market bottom and predicting Bitcoin will move higher.
narrative: After spending late 2025 profiting from bearish ETH shorts, his latest analysis suggests the market has bottomed and identifies new catalysts like STRC to propel BTC prices upward. He argues against the bearish 4-Year Cycle narrative, advising that the current environment offers a buying opportunity rather than further downside.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
